description: Shareable Sample Catalog — public /share/[token] page for leads to view curated clips without auth, plus publish_share_link MCP tool

userStories.title: Add share columns to datasets table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need share_token, share_expires_at, share_first_viewed_at, and share_view_count columns on the datasets table so datasets can be made publicly viewable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260412_share_token.sql
ALTER TABLE adds share_token (text UNIQUE), share_expires_at (timestamptz), share_first_viewed_at (timestamptz), share_view_count (int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)
Partial index on share_token WHERE share_token IS NOT NULL
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add publish_share_link MCP tool
userStories.description: As an admin using MCP tools, I want to generate a public share link for a dataset so I can send it to prospects.
acceptanceCriteria: Register publish_share_link tool in src/lib/mcp/server.ts following existing tool pattern
Parameters: dataset_id (uuid, required), expires_in_days (number, default 30)
Idempotent: if share_token already exists on the dataset, return existing token without regenerating
If no token exists, generate 64-char hex token via crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex')
Set share_expires_at to now + expires_in_days
Return JSON with share_url (https://claru.ai/share/[token]), dataset name, and token
Register the tool in createMcpServer function
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create share page server component
userStories.description: As a lead who received a share link, I can open /share/[token] without logging in and see a branded catalog page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/share/[token]/page.tsx as a server component with export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
Query datasets by share_token using admin client with parameterized query (never string interpolation)
Validate: token found AND (share_expires_at is null OR share_expires_at > now)
If invalid/expired, render styled 'This link is no longer available' page

Query clips with explicit column list: id, filename, mime_type, s3_bucket, s3_key, ann_metadata, ai_enrichment_json, ai_caption, tech_duration_seconds, tech_resolution_width, tech_resolution_height, tech_fps — never SELECT *
Generate CloudFront signed URLs server-side for each clip using existing signer
Do NOT pass s3_bucket, s3_key, or embedding to the client component
Atomic view tracking: UPDATE datasets SET share_view_count = share_view_count + 1, share_first_viewed_at = COALESCE(share_first_viewed_at, now()) WHERE share_token = $1
Get company name via lead_dataset_access JOIN to leads table (LIMIT 1)
Set Cache-Control: private, no-store header
Set robots noindex/nofollow meta tags and X-Robots-Tag header
Set og:title and og:description meta tags for Slack/email link previews
Pass sanitized clip data to ShareCatalog client component
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: s3_bucket and s3_key are used server-side ONLY for CloudFront URL generation. The client component receives signedUrl instead.

userStories.title: Create ShareCatalog client component
userStories.description: As a lead viewing the shared catalog, I can see clips in a responsive grid, play videos inline, and expand annotation details.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/share/[token]/ShareCatalog.tsx as a client component
Props: clips array (id, filename, signedUrl, caption, metadata, techSpecs), datasetName, companyName, token
Header: Claru logo + 'Prepared for [Company Name]' + dataset name
Responsive grid of clip cards (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3 col desktop)
Each card: video element with poster frame, controlsList='nodownload', plays on click
Each card: expandable panel showing ann_metadata, ai_enrichment_json, tech specs as formatted JSON
Video onError handler calls /api/share/[token]/urls to refresh expired signed URLs
Use existing design system: dark theme (--bg-primary), sage accent (--accent-primary), JetBrains Mono for labels
Loading skeleton while videos load poster frames
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create signed URL refresh API route
userStories.description: As a lead with a tab open for >1hr, I need expired CloudFront URLs to refresh automatically when I try to play a video.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/share/[token]/urls/route.ts as a POST route
Validate share_token same as page (exists, not expired, active)
Fetch clips for dataset with explicit column list (same as page)
Generate fresh CloudFront signed URLs
Return JSON: { clips: [{ id, signedUrl }] }
Return 404 for invalid/expired tokens
Set Cache-Control: private, no-store
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: SEO prevention — robots.txt, sitemap exclusion
userStories.description: As the site owner, I need share pages completely invisible to search engines and AI crawlers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update public/robots.txt (or Next.js robots() metadata) with Disallow: /share/
Update src/app/sitemap.ts to exclude /share/* paths
Verify: no internal <a href> links point to /share/ from any indexed page
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The noindex meta tag and X-Robots-Tag header are already handled in US-003 (page component).
